title: pittosporum odoratissimum
intro: Pittosporum odoratissimum, also known as the Mock Orange or Florid Pittosporum, is a flowering evergreen shrub native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pittosporum odoratissimum include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pittosporum odoratissimum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote a sense of calm and well-being.
